title: Leaves Is OP
description: Turn leaves into an overpowered loot source for fast and exciting Minecraft gameplay.
body:
The Leaves Are OP datapack turns simple leaf blocks into a powerful loot source. Breaking leaves can drop overpowered items, rare resources, or valuable rewards, making tree farming and exploration much more exciting and rewarding.

This datapack adds a fun and chaotic twist to normal gameplay while keeping vanilla mechanics familiar. It’s perfect for survival worlds, custom challenges, and multiplayer servers where progression is faster and more enjoyable.

Features

Leaves drop OP items and rare loot

Makes tree farming highly rewarding

Boosts early- and mid-game progression

Fun and chaotic survival gameplay

Fully compatible with vanilla Minecraft

Works in singleplayer and multiplayer
